milestoneTitle: Phase M9.6c — Drafts filter + coverage matrix. The filter chip previously labeled Pinned now reads Drafts and narrows to type="draft" items only — the user's explicit to-author list from Pin-to-learn on Tools. Pin-to-Up-Next (drag / ⋯ menu) stays as-is for any curated item. Each draft card now carries a fuzzy coverage matrix cross-referencing the source tool's name + snippetTags against authored lessons, Academy courses, snippets (by tag overlap + keyword), and YouTube videos from the loaded feed — so the user sees at a glance whether the topic is already covered or is a blank slate. All in-memory, no database (by design — matrix can be swapped for a structured toolIds field on content records in a later milestone without changing the UI).
